suggestions.match:
¡Bien hecho! ¡Profundizaste en varias áreas de PostgreSQL! 🐘 Espero que hayas aprendido algo nuevo, o al menos tengas una puntuación de la que presumir. 🏆

Echa un vistazo a Parte 2 para más diversión con Postgres! 🚀

¿Quieres más emociones en la vida? Revisa mi Colección de Quiz para diversión sin fin*.
suggestions.replacement:
¡Bien hecho! ¡Profundizaste en varias áreas de PostgreSQL! 🐘 Espero que hayas aprendido algo nuevo, o al menos tengas una puntuación de la que presumir. 🏆

Check out [Part 2](/quiz-postgres-sql-mastery-pt2/) for more Postgres fun! 🚀

Want more thrills in life? Check out my [Quiz Collection](/challenges/) for endless* fun!
suggestions.reason: The current translation uses HTML <a> tags instead of Markdown links for the footer, which is inconsistent with the source and other posts. Also, the spacing is slightly off.

rationale: The current translation is actually very high quality, technically accurate, and preserves the MDX structure perfectly. The judge report suggested switching to a candidate that had corrupted strings (e.g., '{text: 'They"'},'), which is a regression. I am sticking with 'current' as it is the most stable and accurate version, with only a minor suggestion to align the footer link syntax with the rest of the site's style.

suggestionLog.reason: The candidate has a corrupted option text in Challenge 4, losing the original meaning.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.reason: Missing space in the group name for Challenge 8.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.reason: The candidate has a corrupted option text in Challenge 4, losing the original meaning and breaking the syntax.
